content:
🚀 BRING | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Developing and playing in persistent, AI-driven fantasy role-playing games with rich narrative and intelligent NPCs.
✨ Key Features: • Layered World Building (L1, L2, L3) • Graph-First Knowledge Management with self-healing graph • Self-Optimising Memory (FAISS-accelerated, time-based partitioning) • Deterministic Probability System for actions • Advanced Romance and Birth/Isekai systems
📖 Summary: BRING v2 is a production-ready, AI-powered platform for creating persistent fantasy worlds with interactive roleplaying. It combines generative world building, graph-based knowledge management, and LLM-driven narrative orchestration with FAISS-accelerated memory for intelligent NPCs and dynamic storytelling.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
